sourcesContent:
export const linkHomeDesign = {
  wrapper:
    "p-8 min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 to-slate-200",

  header: "flex items-center justify-between mb-8",

  title: "text-3xl font-bold text-slate-800",

  card:
    "bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-lg border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl shadow-xl",

  formWrapper: "p-6 flex gap-4 items-center",

  input:
    "flex-1 bg-white border border-slate-300 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 transition",

  button:
    "flex items-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white px-5 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition shadow-md",

  tableWrapper: "mt-6 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl",

  tableHeader:
    "bg-slate-100 text-xs uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-500",

  row:
    "flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4 border-t border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 transition",

  emptyState:
    "p-10 text-center text-slate-400 text-sm",
};
